case_title: ROXANA ELIZABETH REYES VS. BISMARK ANTONIO LOAISIGA SANTA MARIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOAISIGA SANTA MARIA, BISMARK ANTONIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, ROXANA ELIZABETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOAISIGA SANTA MARIA, BISMARK ANTONIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REYES, ROXANA ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT LOAISIGA SANTA MARIA, BISMARK ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROXANA ELIZABETH REYES & DEFENDANT BISMARK ANTONIA LOAISIGA SANTA MARIA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REMARK: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO ERROL ZSHORNACK ON 9/26/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "VACANT-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
